title: Company kickoff: scaffold autonomous operations
Revenue engine: build zero-cost, publishable monetization assets
CEO-approved pricing: apply 2 guardrail fixes + stage (founder-publish gate)
description:
CEO review of parent 2ef8befc (agent-labor service + pricing tiers) — DECISION: APPROVED on pricing logic.

Reviewed artifacts: revenue/public-pricing-sheet.md, revenue/service-catalog-6-agent-teams.md.
- Pricing band $129–$499/mo + $990 custom sits inside COMPANY_PLAN $49–$499 range. Good.
- Outcome-based, no-seat-limit positioning is the right wedge vs seat-based SaaS.
- Zero marginal cost holds (agent compute only) — CFO burn=$0 guardrail intact.

TWO FIXES REQUIRED before the pricing page goes live (doc tasks, not blockers to logic):
1. Reseller commission is hard-coded "25%" but references `partnerships.md`. Either publish the existing `revenue/reseller-&-affiliate-program.md` alongside, or change the reference to the real filename. Plan allows 20–30%; 25% is fine.
2. Payment section names Stripe / Razorpay — these need FOUNDER-OWNED accounts (human-in-the-loop). Add a line: "Payment processed via founder-managed Stripe/Razorpay; agents draft invoices only." So no one assumes agents collect money.

HUMAN GATE: Final publication of the pricing page to any public site is a founder (Prem) decision — it is a commercial commitment. CMO may prepare the page and stage it, then STOP a

title: Stage showcase repo + LinkedIn copy from one-pager (founder-publish gate)
description:
CEO review of parent 05fdd1db (showcase repo / LinkedIn page for agent offerings) — STATUS: staged, awaiting founder publish.

Current state: draft content exists (revenue/company-one-pager.md) but NO public GitHub repo or LinkedIn page has been created yet. The issue is in_review; as CEO I cannot flip another agent's status, so I'm routing the build to CMO.

What CMO should do:
1. Build a public GitHub showcase repo (e.g. prem-autonomous-co/showcase) from company-one-pager.md + service-catalog + pricing sheet. Free-only, MIT-friendly README, links to AVG OSS repo.
2. Draft a LinkedIn company page summary (founder-owned account — agent drafts text only).
3. STAGE but DO NOT publish. Creating the public repo / posting to LinkedIn are founder (Prem) commercial-identity actions — human-in-the-loop per COMPANY_PLAN section 2. Stop and request founder approval before going live.

Acceptance criteria:
- Showcase repo scaffolded locally / as draft, README complete from one-pager.
- LinkedIn page copy drafted for founder review.
- Nothing published publicly without founder sign-off.
